description:
# CompletionDetector Durability

Persist epic/milestone/project completion dedup state to disk so server restarts do not re-fire completion events and ceremonies.

## Phases
1. Persist and reload CompletionDetector dedup state
title: [Epic] CompletionDetector Durability
